metadata.description: Kanban board for User and Role Management System. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: User and Role Management System
tasks.description: Implement user management with role assignment (Owner, Manager, Employee, Cashier), permissions, and user invitation system.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to add employees and assign them appropriate roles so that I can control access and permissions for different users.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a store owner wants to add a user, when they enter email and select a role, then an invitation email is sent and user account is created in pending state
Given a user receives an invitation, when they accept and set up their account, then they gain access based on their assigned role
Given a store owner views users, when they access the user management page, then they see all users with their roles and status
Given a store owner wants to change a user's role, when they update the role, then permissions are immediately updated
Given a store owner removes a user, when confirmed, then the user loses access and cannot log in
Given a user with Employee role, when they attempt to access Manager-only features, then access is denied with appropriate message
Given permissions are defined, when a user performs an action, then the system checks permissions before allowing the action
tasks.businessValue: Enables multi-user stores with appropriate access control. Critical for security and operational control.
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement role-based access control (RBAC). Define permission matrix for each role. Use Azure AD B2C for user accounts. Store role assignments in database with company association.
successMetrics: User invitation acceptance rate: 80%+ of invitations are accepted
Permission enforcement: 100% of unauthorized access attempts are blocked
businessRules: Each company must have at least one Owner role user
Owner role cannot be removed if it's the last Owner
Roles: Owner (full access), Manager (most access except billing), Employee (inventory and sales), Cashier (sales only)
Removed users' historical actions are preserved for audit
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
